queryDetails.queryDescription: Pricing Summary Report - aggregates line items by return/ship status
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT l_returnflag, l_linestatus, SUM(l_quantity), SUM(l_extendedprice)... FROM LINEITEM

queryDetails.queryDescription: Minimum Cost Supplier - finds suppliers for parts with minimum cost in region
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey... WHERE ps_supplycost = (SELECT MIN(ps_supplycost)...)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Shipping Priority - 3-way join with aggregation and date filtering
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT l_orderkey, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue... FROM CUSTOMER, ORDERS, LINEITEM

queryDetails.queryDescription: Order Priority Checking - counts late-delivered orders using EXISTS
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT o_orderpriority, COUNT(*) FROM ORDERS WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM LINEITEM WHERE l_commitdate < l_receiptdate)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Local Supplier Volume - 6-way join for regional revenue analysis
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT n_name, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) FROM CUSTOMER, ORDERS, LINEITEM, SUPPLIER, NATION, REGION

queryDetails.queryDescription: Forecasting Revenue Change - single table discount impact analysis
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice * l_discount) as revenue FROM LINEITEM WHERE l_shipdate >= date '1994-01-01'

queryDetails.queryDescription: Volume Shipping - 6-way join for cross-border shipping revenue by year
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, SUM(volume) FROM (SELECT n1.n_name, n2.n_name, EXTRACT(year...))

queryDetails.queryDescription: National Market Share - 8-way join calculating market share by nation/year
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT o_year, SUM(CASE WHEN nation='BRAZIL' THEN volume END) / SUM(volume) FROM (8-table subquery)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Product Type Profit Measure - 6-way join calculating profit by nation/year
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT nation, o_year, SUM(amount) FROM (SELECT n_name, EXTRACT(year...), l_extendedprice - ps_supplycost)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Returned Item Reporting - 4-way join analyzing customer returns
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT c_custkey, c_name, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) FROM CUSTOMER, ORDERS, LINEITEM, NATION

queryDetails.queryDescription: Important Stock Identification - HAVING with subquery threshold comparison
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT ps_partkey, SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) FROM PARTSUPP HAVING SUM(...) > (SELECT SUM(...) * 0.0001)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Shipping Modes and Order Priority - 2-way join with CASE aggregations
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT l_shipmode, SUM(CASE WHEN o_orderpriority IN ('1-URGENT','2-HIGH') THEN 1 END) FROM ORDERS, LINEITEM

queryDetails.queryDescription: Customer Distribution - LEFT JOIN with double aggregation and NULL handling
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT c_count, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT c_custkey, COUNT(o_orderkey) FROM CUSTOMER LEFT JOIN ORDERS...)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Promotion Effect - 2-way join calculating promotion revenue percentage
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT 100.00 * SUM(CASE WHEN p_type LIKE 'PROMO%' THEN ... END) / SUM(...) FROM LINEITEM, PART

queryDetails.queryDescription: Top Supplier Query - CTE with MAX subquery for top revenue supplier
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: WITH revenue0 AS (SELECT l_suppkey, SUM(...) FROM LINEITEM...) SELECT s_suppkey, s_name... WHERE total_revenue = (SELECT MAX...)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Parts/Supplier Relationship - NOT IN subquery with DISTINCT COUNT
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT p_brand, p_type, p_size, COUNT(DISTINCT ps_suppkey) FROM PARTSUPP, PART WHERE ps_suppkey NOT IN (SELECT...)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Small-Quantity-Order Revenue - correlated subquery comparing to AVG
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice) / 7.0 FROM LINEITEM, PART WHERE l_quantity < (SELECT 0.2 * AVG(l_quantity)...)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Large Volume Customer - IN subquery with HAVING filter for large orders
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT c_name, c_custkey, o_orderkey... WHERE o_orderkey IN (SELECT l_orderkey FROM LINEITEM HAVING SUM(l_quantity) > 300)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Discounted Revenue - 2-way join with complex OR conditions across predicates
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) FROM LINEITEM, PART WHERE (p_brand='Brand#12' AND p_container IN...) OR...

queryDetails.queryDescription: Potential Part Promotion - 3-level nested IN subqueries with correlation
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT s_name, s_address FROM SUPPLIER WHERE s_suppkey IN (SELECT ps_suppkey WHERE ps_partkey IN (SELECT p_partkey...))

queryDetails.queryDescription: Suppliers Who Kept Orders Waiting - EXISTS and NOT EXISTS with self-joins
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT s_name, COUNT(*) FROM SUPPLIER, LINEITEM l1, ORDERS WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM l2...) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM l3...)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Global Sales Opportunity - NOT EXISTS with nested subquery for dormant customers
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT cntrycode, COUNT(*), SUM(c_acctbal) FROM (SELECT SUBSTR(c_phone,1,2), c_acctbal WHERE c_acctbal > (SELECT AVG...) AND NOT EXISTS...)

queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT l_returnflag, l_linestatus, SUM(l_quantity), SUM(l_extendedprice)... FROM LINEITEM

queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT c_custkey, c_name, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) FROM CUSTOMER, ORDERS, LINEITEM, NATION

queryDetails.queryDescription: Large Volume Customer - IN subquery with HAVING filter for large orders
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT c_name, c_custkey, o_orderkey... WHERE o_orderkey IN (SELECT l_orderkey FROM LINEITEM HAVING SUM(l_quantity) > 300)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Pricing Summary Report - aggregates line items by return/ship status
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT l_returnflag, l_linestatus, SUM(l_quantity), SUM(l_extendedprice)... FROM LINEITEM

queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT l_orderkey, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue... FROM CUSTOMER, ORDERS, LINEITEM

queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT c_custkey, c_name, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) FROM CUSTOMER, ORDERS, LINEITEM, NATION

queryDetails.queryDescription: Large Volume Customer - IN subquery with HAVING filter for large orders
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT c_name, c_custkey, o_orderkey... WHERE o_orderkey IN (SELECT l_orderkey FROM LINEITEM HAVING SUM(l_quantity) > 300)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Pricing Summary Report - aggregates line items by return/ship status
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT l_returnflag, l_linestatus, SUM(l_quantity), SUM(l_extendedprice)... FROM LINEITEM

queryDetails.queryDescription: Minimum Cost Supplier - finds suppliers for parts with minimum cost in region
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey... WHERE ps_supplycost = (SELECT MIN(ps_supplycost)...)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Shipping Priority - 3-way join with aggregation and date filtering
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT l_orderkey, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue... FROM CUSTOMER, ORDERS, LINEITEM

queryDetails.queryDescription: Order Priority Checking - counts late-delivered orders using EXISTS
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT o_orderpriority, COUNT(*) FROM ORDERS WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM LINEITEM WHERE l_commitdate < l_receiptdate)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Local Supplier Volume - 6-way join for regional revenue analysis
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT n_name, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) FROM CUSTOMER, ORDERS, LINEITEM, SUPPLIER, NATION, REGION

queryDetails.queryDescription: Forecasting Revenue Change - single table discount impact analysis
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice * l_discount) as revenue FROM LINEITEM WHERE l_shipdate >= date '1994-01-01'

queryDetails.queryDescription: Volume Shipping - 6-way join for cross-border shipping revenue by year
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, SUM(volume) FROM (SELECT n1.n_name, n2.n_name, EXTRACT(year...))

queryDetails.queryDescription: National Market Share - 8-way join calculating market share by nation/year
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT o_year, SUM(CASE WHEN nation='BRAZIL' THEN volume END) / SUM(volume) FROM (8-table subquery)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Product Type Profit Measure - 6-way join calculating profit by nation/year
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT nation, o_year, SUM(amount) FROM (SELECT n_name, EXTRACT(year...), l_extendedprice - ps_supplycost)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Returned Item Reporting - 4-way join analyzing customer returns
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT c_custkey, c_name, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) FROM CUSTOMER, ORDERS, LINEITEM, NATION

queryDetails.queryDescription: Important Stock Identification - HAVING with subquery threshold comparison
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT ps_partkey, SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) FROM PARTSUPP HAVING SUM(...) > (SELECT SUM(...) * 0.0001)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Shipping Modes and Order Priority - 2-way join with CASE aggregations
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT l_shipmode, SUM(CASE WHEN o_orderpriority IN ('1-URGENT','2-HIGH') THEN 1 END) FROM ORDERS, LINEITEM

queryDetails.queryDescription: Customer Distribution - LEFT JOIN with double aggregation and NULL handling
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT c_count, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT c_custkey, COUNT(o_orderkey) FROM CUSTOMER LEFT JOIN ORDERS...)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Promotion Effect - 2-way join calculating promotion revenue percentage
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT 100.00 * SUM(CASE WHEN p_type LIKE 'PROMO%' THEN ... END) / SUM(...) FROM LINEITEM, PART

queryDetails.queryDescription: Top Supplier Query - CTE with MAX subquery for top revenue supplier
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: WITH revenue0 AS (SELECT l_suppkey, SUM(...) FROM LINEITEM...) SELECT s_suppkey, s_name... WHERE total_revenue = (SELECT MAX...)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Parts/Supplier Relationship - NOT IN subquery with DISTINCT COUNT
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT p_brand, p_type, p_size, COUNT(DISTINCT ps_suppkey) FROM PARTSUPP, PART WHERE ps_suppkey NOT IN (SELECT...)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Small-Quantity-Order Revenue - correlated subquery comparing to AVG
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice) / 7.0 FROM LINEITEM, PART WHERE l_quantity < (SELECT 0.2 * AVG(l_quantity)...)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Large Volume Customer - IN subquery with HAVING filter for large orders
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT c_name, c_custkey, o_orderkey... WHERE o_orderkey IN (SELECT l_orderkey FROM LINEITEM HAVING SUM(l_quantity) > 300)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Discounted Revenue - 2-way join with complex OR conditions across predicates
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) FROM LINEITEM, PART WHERE (p_brand='Brand#12' AND p_container IN...) OR...

queryDetails.queryDescription: Potential Part Promotion - 3-level nested IN subqueries with correlation
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT s_name, s_address FROM SUPPLIER WHERE s_suppkey IN (SELECT ps_suppkey WHERE ps_partkey IN (SELECT p_partkey...))

queryDetails.queryDescription: Suppliers Who Kept Orders Waiting - EXISTS and NOT EXISTS with self-joins
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT s_name, COUNT(*) FROM SUPPLIER, LINEITEM l1, ORDERS WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM l2...) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM l3...)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Global Sales Opportunity - NOT EXISTS with nested subquery for dormant customers
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT cntrycode, COUNT(*), SUM(c_acctbal) FROM (SELECT SUBSTR(c_phone,1,2), c_acctbal WHERE c_acctbal > (SELECT AVG...) AND NOT EXISTS...)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Promotion Effect - 2-way join calculating promotion revenue percentage
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT 100.00 * SUM(CASE WHEN p_type LIKE 'PROMO%' THEN ... END) / SUM(...) FROM LINEITEM, PART

queryDetails.queryDescription: Top Supplier Query - CTE with MAX subquery for top revenue supplier
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: WITH revenue0 AS (SELECT l_suppkey, SUM(...) FROM LINEITEM...) SELECT s_suppkey, s_name... WHERE total_revenue = (SELECT MAX...)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Parts/Supplier Relationship - NOT IN subquery with DISTINCT COUNT
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT p_brand, p_type, p_size, COUNT(DISTINCT ps_suppkey) FROM PARTSUPP, PART WHERE ps_suppkey NOT IN (SELECT...)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Small-Quantity-Order Revenue - correlated subquery comparing to AVG
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice) / 7.0 FROM LINEITEM, PART WHERE l_quantity < (SELECT 0.2 * AVG(l_quantity)...)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Large Volume Customer - IN subquery with HAVING filter for large orders
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT c_name, c_custkey, o_orderkey... WHERE o_orderkey IN (SELECT l_orderkey FROM LINEITEM HAVING SUM(l_quantity) > 300)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Discounted Revenue - 2-way join with complex OR conditions across predicates
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) FROM LINEITEM, PART WHERE (p_brand='Brand#12' AND p_container IN...) OR...

queryDetails.queryDescription: Potential Part Promotion - 3-level nested IN subqueries with correlation
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT s_name, s_address FROM SUPPLIER WHERE s_suppkey IN (SELECT ps_suppkey WHERE ps_partkey IN (SELECT p_partkey...))

queryDetails.queryDescription: Suppliers Who Kept Orders Waiting - EXISTS and NOT EXISTS with self-joins
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT s_name, COUNT(*) FROM SUPPLIER, LINEITEM l1, ORDERS WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM l2...) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM l3...)

queryDetails.queryDescription: Global Sales Opportunity - NOT EXISTS with nested subquery for dormant customers
queryDetails.sqlSnippet: SELECT cntrycode, COUNT(*), SUM(c_acctbal) FROM (SELECT SUBSTR(c_phone,1,2), c_acctbal WHERE c_acctbal > (SELECT AVG...) AND NOT EXISTS...)
